case_title: YURI MEGRABYAN VS. KRISTEN CHIRHART et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEGRABYAN, YURI

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-04-2011. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-17-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. FEB-04-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE APR-14-2011.
ARBITRATOR BRIAN FREDRICK HAAVISTO APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-18-2011 THROUGH JUL-17-2011.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY LUNDBERG, JASON
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-19-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-17-2011 - CASE SETTLED AT CONFERENCE. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON JUL-19-2011 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEGRABYAN, YURI AS TO DEFENDANT CHIRHART, KRISTEN DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-04-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-01-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-20-2011
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CHIRHART, KRISTEN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHIRHART, KRISTEN
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-15-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-15-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
